channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: An emotional Rafael Nadal retires at the Davis Cup after he loses and Spain is eliminated
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal bit his lower lip and his reddened eyes welled with tears as he stood alongside his Davis Cup teammates for Spain's national anthem Tuesday before what he — and everyone — knew might be the last match of his career.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Canucks star JT Miller leaves team for personal reasons
item.description: Vancouver Canucks star J.T. Miller will be away from the team indefinitely as he takes a leave of absence, the organization said Tuesday. No reason was given.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kam Jones pays tribute to his high school coach with 3rd triple-double in Marquette history
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Marquette’s Kam Jones wants to spend this season honoring one of his high school coaches. He’s off to a heck of a start.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kam Jones gets triple-double as No. 15 Marquette trounces No. 6 Purdue 76-58
item.description: Kam Jones had 17 points, 13 rebounds and 10 assists as No. 15 Marquette defeated No. 6 Purdue 76-58 to snap the Boilermakers’ 39-game regular-season nonconference winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kansas coach Bill Self reaches 800 wins. His big goal this season is a 3rd national title
item.description: One week after Bill Self became the winningest coach at Kansas, the Hall of Famer joined John Calipari and Rick Barnes as the only active Division I head coaches with 800 wins.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Washington school board begs state to keep trans athletes out of girls' sports after girls were affected
item.description: A school board in Washington passed a resolution urging its athletic conference to reconsider its stance on trans inclusion in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays say new St. Pete stadium is unlikely to be ready for 2028 season, if at all
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — A combination of severe hurricane damage to Tropicana Field and political delays on financing means it is highly unlikely the Tampa Bay Rays' planned new stadium will be ready for the 2028 season, if at all, the team said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys brass 'didn't anticipate' miserable record, season
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys had a relatively quite offseason this past summer, but the franchise did not appear to expect the type of season they are experiencing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU still controls own destiny for Big 12 Championship
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is in a position it hasn't been in all season long -- trying to bounce back from a loss. The Cougars suffered their first defeat of the season Saturday night, a disappointing 17-13 loss to Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mountain West Conference determines there's insufficient evidence in volleyball Title IX complaint
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Mountain West Conference has concluded there was insufficient evidence to determine misconduct between women's volleyball players from the Colorado State and San Jose State programs ahead of a match last month after a coach filed a Title IX complaint alleging the student-ath
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 37, Cavaliers stay perfect and improve to 14-0 with 144-126 win over Bulls
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 37 points, Darius Garland had 29 and the Cleveland Cavaliers continued one of the best starts in league history, improving to 14-0 with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Garrett Crochet named AL Comeback Player of the Year
item.description: Chicago White Sox pitcher Garrett Crochet was named American League Comeback Player of the Year after a successful season as a starting pitcher, striking out 209 batters over 32 starts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Lone Peak holds off Skyridge in 6A semifinal, 28-21
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Lone Peak Knights avenged a loss earlier in the season to Skyridge, and are headed back to the 6A championship game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry upset after Klay 'ghosted' him before game, Draymond Green says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- While it seemed to be all sunshine and roses inside Chase Center as the packed arena welcomed back Klay Thompson on Tuesday, that wasn't exactly the case -- at least amongst the players on the court.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Lindsey Vonn is coming out of retirement to rejoin the U.S. Ski Team, she announced Thursday, intending to race again at age 40 — and six years after her last Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sports Network launching subscription streaming service
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Sports Network is launching a streaming service Friday amid its negotiations with Xfinity. The subscription service will start at $19.99 for one team or $29.99 for full access to CHSN. A 7-day free trial is being offered.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Clippers write love letter to Los Angeles with new City Edition uniforms
item.description: With the NBA now in full swing and the brand-new Intuit Dome open for business, the Los Angeles Clippers have unveiled their City Edition uniforms for the new season. The new look, which the team says symbolizes the story and work of L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: San Diego Gulls to host Military Appreciation Night this Saturday
item.description: Get ready for an exciting evening of hockey, entertainment and heartfelt gratitude this Saturday, Nov. 16, as the San Diego Gulls host their Military Appreciation Night.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Vejmelka makes 49 saves as Utah beats Carolina, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club needed a victory in the worst way, and backup goalie Karel Vejmelka made sure they got one. Vejmelka made a career-high 49 saves, as Utah killed off over ten minutes of power plays in route to a 4-1 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bruce-Mahoney basketball games to be played for the first-time ever at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- One of the oldest high school sports rivalries in the country is taking its annual basketball matchup to San Francisco's biggest basketball stage. For the first time, the Bruce-Mahoney basketball game will be played at the Chase Center. The St.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Mitchell Chaffee's journey to the Tampa Bay Lightning
item.description: Making it to the NHL is a huge accomplishment for forward Mitchell Chaffee, especially as an undrafted player. Not only did he beat the odds, he’s overcome a serious injury.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Legendary Dodgers pitcher Fernando Valenzuela's cause of death revealed
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the legendary Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher, died of septic shock according to TMZ.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Judge denies Vanderbilt University QB's temporary restraining order
item.description: A federal judge has denied a Vanderbilt University quarterback's motion for a temporary restraining order.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Barker, NewsNation
